message:
🐛 Exempt read-only localhost requests from kc-agent auth (#10781)

* 🐛 Exempt read-only localhost requests from kc-agent auth

Desktop widgets (Übersicht) query the agent via curl on 127.0.0.1
without auth tokens. Since the agent only binds to loopback, all
requests are inherently local. Exempt GET/HEAD requests that carry
no Origin header — browser CSRF attacks always include Origin, so
this remains safe.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🧪 Fix auth tests: add Origin header for browser-like requests

Tests that verify 401 on missing/invalid tokens now include an
Origin header to simulate browser requests. Without Origin, the
new localhost exemption correctly allows the request (widget path).
Also adds explicit test cases for the widget exemption.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
